recap:
- Built a LangChain agent integrated with tools governed by Unity Catalog.
- Utilized the `UCFunctionToolkit` to bridge Unity Catalog functions into LangChain.
- Configured a foundation model to enable tool-calling capabilities.
- Executed an AI agent that reasons about user queries and invokes the necessary tools.
- Employed MLflow for tracing and analyzing agent behavior.
- Developed production-ready AI agents that leverage organizational data assets while ensuring governance and security.
- Maintained lineage tracking for data assets stored in Unity Catalog.
